compiled_state.title: RED: Add Docker/code-based DB detection tests to test-project-detect.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Modify tests/scripts/test-project-detect.sh to add tests for enhanced Docker/code-based database detection beyond existing docker-compose.yml image line parsing.

### Specific failing tests to write:
- test_db_detection_dockerfile: Creates fixture with Dockerfile containing FROM postgres:14, asserts db_present=true and db_services includes postgres
- test_db_detection_app_code_import: Creates fixture with app.py containing import psycopg2, asserts db_present=true
- test_db_detection_env_file: Creates fixture with .env containing DATABASE_URL=postgresql://..., asserts db_present=true
- test_db_detection_docker_compose_regression: Verifies existing docker-compose detection still works (guard against regression)

### Test approach
Create temp fixture dirs with various DB reference patterns, run project-detect.sh, assert db_present and db_services values. Tests will fail (RED) because project-detect.sh does not scan Dockerfile/code/env files yet. The docker-compose regression test should pass immediately (it tests existing behavior).

### .test-index RED marker
Add entry or update existing: plugins/dso/scripts/project-detect.sh: tests/scripts/test-project-detect.sh [test_db_detection_dockerfile]
(Place RED tests at end of file, after all existing and T1 tests)

## File Impact
- tests/scripts/test-project-detect.sh (modify — add DB detection tests at end)
- .test-index (modify — update RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes with RED-marked tests tolerated
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py 2>/dev/null; true
- [ ] At least 3 new DB detection test functions exist
  Verify: grep -c 'test_db_detection_' tests/scripts/test-project-detect.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] .test-index has RED marker for DB detection tests
  Verify: grep -q 'project-detect.sh.*\[test_db_detection' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — 116 pass, 3 RED tests fail as expected (Dockerfile, app code import, .env detection)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All acceptance criteria verified. 4 new test functions added (1 regression passes, 3 RED tests fail as expected). .test-index RED marker confirmed.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Added 4 Docker/code-based DB detection tests to test-project-detect.sh (Dockerfile, app code imports, .env file, docker-compose regression)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
